Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Chris Hammill. Author, maintainer.

  • Daniel Cassel. Author.

  • Nick Wang. Contributor.

  • Gabriel Devenyi. Contributor.

  • Benjamin Darwin. Contributor.

  • Bilal Syed. Contributor.

  • Vladimir Fonov. Contributor.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Lerch J, Hammill C, van Eede M, Cassel D (2026). RMINC: Statistical Tools for Medical Imaging NetCDF (MINC) Files. R package version 2.0.0.0, http://mouse-imaging-centre.github.io/RMINC.
